signals.headline: Fed Chair Powell Warns of 'Very Unusual' Economy with Tariff-Driven Goods Inflation Peaking Q1 2026, Amid Recent Rate Cu
signals.raw:
Fed Chair Powell Warns of 'Very Unusual' Economy with Tariff-Driven Goods Inflation Peaking Q1 2026, Amid Recent Rate Cut and Weakening Labor Market | YES | HIGH confidence** [1]

Powell described the U.S. economy as facing a rare mix of elevated **tariff-driven goods inflation** and a potentially weaker labor market than data shows, with the Fed's latest quarter-point rate cut framed as defensive
